tool: Siril decode/extract_Green (camera raw) + astrometry.net blind solves (solve_field.py --json WCS, evaluated at the frame-center pixel via astropy); epochs from EXIF/DATE-OBS; consumed by scripts/lib/fingerprint.py (auto-loaded on every refresh — the drift measurement is durable)
domain_note: camera-raw solves run on the extracted GREEN plane (half-res grid): px figures are green-px at the solve's own scale; the mount verdict rides the scale-free RA rate
